name: @workspace/enrichment-scraper
description: Python FastAPI sidecar: BS4 + Playwright + Stealth + Crawl4AI web extractor for NexFlow.

scripts.dev: pip install -q -r artifacts/enrichment-scraper/requirements.txt 2>/dev/null; playwright install chromium --with-deps 2>/dev/null || true; python -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-8000} --reload --app-dir artifacts/enrichment-scraper
scripts.start: pip install -q -r artifacts/enrichment-scraper/requirements.txt 2>/dev/null; playwright install chromium 2>/dev/null || true; python -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-8000} --app-dir artifacts/enrichment-scraper
